name: 语法与文风
subject: english
domain_name: 语言与口语 / Language & Speaking / Language & Speaking
curriculum_points: WHST.11-12.4 Produce clear and coherent writing in which the development, organization, and style are appropriate to task, purpose, and audience.

WHST.11-12.5 Develop and strengthen writing as needed by planning, revising, editing, rewriting, or trying a new approach, focusing on addressing what is most significant for a specific purpose and audience.
